name: HelloSign (Dropbox Sign)
description: HelloSign (now Dropbox Sign) is an electronic signature platform. Use this API to send documents for signing, track signature request status, download completed signed PDFs, and manage reusable signing templates. Supports multiple signers, form fields, and legally binding e-signatures.

capabilities.name: create_signature_request
capabilities.description: Send a document to one or more signers for electronic signature. Supports file uploads, form fields, and customizable signing options.

capabilities.name: get_signature_request
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status and details of a specific signature request by its ID.

capabilities.name: list_signature_requests
capabilities.description: List all signature requests for your account with pagination, including their current status.

capabilities.name: download_signed_document
capabilities.description: Download the completed, signed PDF document for a finished signature request.

capabilities.name: create_template
capabilities.description: Create a reusable signing template with predefined signer roles and form fields.

capabilities.name: send_with_template
capabilities.description: Send a signature request using a previously created reusable template, filling in signer details and custom fields.
